ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is active */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed documentation of the component */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is deprecated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for easier search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for the property */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class associated with the property */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the property (for numeric properties) */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the property (for numeric properties) */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for string validation */,
  "validator" TEXT /* Custom validation function or script */,
  "example_value" TEXT /* Example value for the property */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is read-only */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "is_breaking_change" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version includes breaking changes */,
  "backwards_compatible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is backwards compatible with the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that depends on another component */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being depended on */,
  "version_constraint" TEXT /* Version constraint for the dependency */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency and why it is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the action was performed on */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., IP address, user agent) */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the action failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the component was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component was used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the component */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the component was used (e.g., development, production) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
